description: Load PDB 2RH1 (human β2-adrenergic receptor bound to carazolol) into PyMOL. Identify the ligand (carazolol, residue name CAU) in the orthosteric pocket. Determine the 7 transmembrane (TM) helices and color each of the 7 TM helices in a distinct color. Show the ligand as sticks and display protein residues within 4.0 Å of the ligand as sticks. Render a high-resolution PNG and save it to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/gpcr_tm_helices.png'. Write a report to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/gpcr_binding_report.txt' listing: 1) Each protein residue within 4.0 Å of the ligand (residue name and number), 2) Which TM helix (TM1-TM7) each contact residue belongs to, and 3) Explicitly identifying Asp113 as the critical salt-bridge residue.
